sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 78:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 78:1
items.html: The ten Sefirot of the level of Malchut that receives from ZA are called the world of Assiya. (Part 3, Chapter 5, item 1)
